understanding.goal_understanding: Navigate the player through the level to reach the goal gem tile marked '+', without dying, within the turn limit and available attempts, then proceed through subsequent levels until the game is won.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you choose an action such as MOVE_LEFT/MOVE_RIGHT (and other directional moves if available) or CLICK a specified grid coordinate. Movement shifts the player one tile in the chosen direction, but after each action gravity applies in the current gravity direction (here DOWN), causing the player to fall until supported; this can result in multi-tile drops and lateral moves that effectively include falling to a lower ledge. CLICK removes clickable tiles at the target position (if present), changing the map and potentially opening/closing paths; clicks can also indirectly cause the player to fall due to support being removed. Landing on a spike/hazard tile immediately ends the attempt (run failure) and restarts the level, with only 2 attempts per level and 50 turns per attempt. An undo mechanic (if provided) would revert the most recent action(s), restoring player position, removed tiles, and state such as gravity/steps accordingly.

moving_platform.warning: URGENT: rising platform will reach you in 6 horizontal moves. Clicks do not advance the platform. Move upward (toward lower y) or die.
URGENT: rising platform will reach you in 6 horizontal moves. Clicks do not advance the platform. Move upward (toward lower y) or die.
URGENT: rising platform will reach you in 4 horizontal moves. Clicks do not advance the platform. Move upward (toward lower y) or die.

URGENT: rising platform will reach you in 2 horizontal moves. Clicks do not advance the platform. Move upward (toward lower y) or die.
URGENT: rising platform will reach you in 0 horizontal moves. Clicks do not advance the platform. Move upward (toward lower y) or die.
URGENT: rising platform will reach you in 6 horizontal moves. Clicks do not advance the platform. Move upward (toward lower y) or die.
